message:
fix: TraceMonoid identity, certificate fingerprint, DispatchLane, ledger underflow, IoResult sort key

- Fix TraceMonoid::identity() fingerprint mismatch with from_events(&[])
  by computing fingerprint from empty FoataTrace instead of hardcoding 0
- Fix RewriteCertificate::fingerprint() omitting timeout_simplification
  field; delegate to pack_policy() which now encodes all 5 bits
- Fix LabRuntime always recording DispatchLane::Ready by adding
  pop_with_lane() to PriorityScheduler and propagating lane through
  LabScheduler::pop_for_worker
- Fix obligation ledger pending counter underflow risk by using
  saturating_sub(1) in commit/abort/mark_leaked paths
- Fix IoResult sort key collapsing negative byte values to 0; use
  sign-bit flip to preserve total i64 ordering in u64 space
- Fix ClassId::persistence() potential underflow with saturating_sub

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
